_meta.description: ILLUSTRATIVE SAMPLE teaming-partner library. The Shortfall Strategist reads this to recommend teaming as a gap mitigation. All partners here are fictional. Copy to data/teaming_partners.json and replace with your own confirmed relationships to run the system.
_meta.edit_instructions: Use confirmed=true only for partners with an active teaming agreement. confirmed=false partners are suggested but flagged [NEEDS_HUMAN].
